what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset in the design-source channel, identifying deck1-2026/p-09 as a source design ground-truth JPEG and linking it to a blob and authoring session.
observations: YAML frontmatter records id, address, channel, path, blob URI, mime type, source category, author session, and timestamp
The image dimensions w and h are both 0 despite mime being image/jpeg
The body simply labels the file as 'SOURCE design ground-truth — deck1-2026/p-09.jpg'
standouts: Dimensions are 0x0 for a listed JPEG
Serves as a ground-truth metadata stub for a design deck image
Contains a blob:// reference for content-addressable retrieval
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for ledger-style asset metadata
References binary content via a blob:// URI
Categorizes provenance with source and author_session fields
concerns: Zero width/height suggests image metadata extraction may be incomplete or the asset was not fully ingested
Empty links array leaves the asset without immediate contextual relationships in the ledger
notes: A sparse but addressable ledger stub for a design deck image, with a blob pointer but missing size metadata and contextual links.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
What visual content is on deck1-2026/p-09?
How does this page relate to other pages in deck1-2026?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose as a source design ground-truth metadata record matches the content, but the zero dimensions indicate the record may be partially incomplete.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a canonical, retrievable ledger entry for a design deck image so downstream systems can reference its source-of-truth blob and authoring context.
contribution: Provides a stable, addressable metadata record that links a design image to its blob and authoring session, supporting retrieval and provenance tracking in a fused system.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata stub for the design-source image deck1-2026/p-09, referencing a JPEG blob and an author session with zero recorded dimensions and no links.
intention_for_embedding: This file exists to catalog and ground-truth a design deck image asset for later reference and provenance.
